title: Triune God
description: We Believe in one God, eternally existing in three distinct, coequal, and coeternal Persons: the Father, the Son (Jesus Christ), and the Holy Spirit.
verses: Deuteronomy 6:4; Isaiah 48:16; Isaiah 63:10; Psalm 110:1; Matthew 28:19; Luke 3:22

title: Person of Jesus Christ
description: We Believe that Jesus Christ is one Person with two natures—fully God and fully Man.
verses: John 1:18; John 20:28; Titus 2:13; 1 John 4:2; 2 John 7; Luke 2:7

title: Holy Scriptures
description: We Believe that the Scriptures are inspired by the Holy Spirit and are the authoritative Word of God.

title: Saving Work of Christ
description: We Believe in the virgin birth, sinless and perfect life, crucifixion, death, burial, bodily resurrection, and ascension into heaven of Jesus Christ.
verses: Matthew 1:18-25; 1 Peter 2:22; Hebrews 4:15; Matthew 27:26-50; Matthew 28:5-6; Acts 1:9-10

title: Salvation by Grace Through Faith
description: We Believe that anyone who is born of God and believes in Jesus Christ has the right to become a child of God. Salvation is by grace through faith.

title: Baptism of the Holy Spirit
description: We Believe in the baptism of the Holy Spirit for all who are born again.

title: Sanctification
description: We Believe in the sanctifying work of the Triune God and in the responsibility of believers to pursue holiness in their lives.

title: Second Coming of Christ
description: We Believe in the second coming of Jesus Christ, the resurrection of both the redeemed dead and those alive at His coming, and their transformation into incorruptible bodies.

title: Final Judgement
description: We Believe in the righteous judgment of God. He grants eternal life in the new heavens and new earth to born-again believers and renders eternal punishment to those who reject Him and His gospel.

title: Mission of the Church
description: We Believe that the Church is entrusted with spreading the gospel and making disciples of all nations.

title: Ordinances
description: We Believe in the observance of two ordinances: Water Baptism by immersion and participation in Holy Communion (the Lord's Table) by baptized believers.

title: Church Leadership
description: We Believe that the Lord has appointed pastors and teachers to equip the saints for the work of ministry and for the building up of the body of Christ.
